settings.title:
THE MEANING OF
ELEGANCE
settings.description: For Ciro Paone, the concept of elegance is inseparably intertwined with the etymology of the word "Kiton" and the history of his family. An art passed down through generations, where a passion for quality blends with the understanding that needle, thread, and scissors can transform a garment into a true work of art.

settings.newsletterText: Sign up to receive notifications about product launches, special offers, and company news
